## Meeting Purpose

[Address 404 errors on GrowthX blogs causing SEO impact due to migration issues.](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [\~70-80% of blogs (250) not migrated from Webflow to Sanity, causing 404s and SEO decline](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Curtis (Webstacks) expects to upload remaining blogs via script today, using provided CSV](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Emily (Webstacks) to monitor analytics, resubmit sitemap, and conduct post-launch checks](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Issue root cause: internal communication gap during migration process](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)

## Topics

### Migration Issue and SEO Impact

  - [70-80% of blogs (\~250) not migrated from Webflow to Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Resulting 404 pages significantly impacting SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [Risk of losing keyword rankings if not addressed promptly](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [CSV file with T\&D article dump shared with Julie for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Current Status and Action Plan

  - [Webstacks team identified exact cause and solution](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Curtis converting CSV to JSON for Sanity import](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Script being written to upload remaining blogs (ETA: couple of hours)](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Precautions to avoid overwriting existing, updated blog content](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [HTML formatting to be converted to Sanity's Portable Text format](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [URLs/slugs confirmed to remain unchanged (critical for SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Emily compared CSV against recent live blog crawl to ensure URL consistency](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Post-upload plan: 24-hour wait, then resubmit sitemap to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Ongoing monitoring of analytics (GA) and additional crawls planned](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Root Cause Analysis

  - [Discrepancy between initial site crawl and content inventory sheet](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Internal communication issue: assumption about migration method (script vs. manual)](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Ongoing investigation for complete understanding](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Curtis to complete script and upload remaining \~250 blogs today](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Emily to monitor analytics, resubmit sitemap after 24 hours](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Conduct post-launch crawls and checks over next few days](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Continue investigation into root cause for future prevention](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Team to flag any blockers or issues via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/p2TMF8tLLxCSSutczbRs82F-TWb9bsze?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
